justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent consistently and accurately interpreted all temporal expressions provided by the user throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent repeatedly reported unavailability and then asked the user to pick a new time without offering a diverse range of alternatives or proactively suggesting different contact mediums earlier in the conversation.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent engaged in multiple avoidable round-trips by checking one morning slot at a time, leading to a very lengthy and repetitive interaction.
justifications.customer_experience: The conversation was frustrating due to the repetitive nature of the agent's responses and its inability to proactively offer a wider range of solutions, making the user do all the work in finding an available slot.

judge_scores.overall_notes: The agent's inability to proactively suggest alternative times (e.g., afternoons) or different contact mediums (e.g., branch meeting) earlier in the conversation led to a very inefficient and frustrating user experience, despite its perfect temporal understanding.
